headline: NTSB UPS Crash Hearings Put Safety Risks And Valuation In Focus
summary: Federal investigators are holding ongoing NTSB hearings into a UPS cargo jet crash in Louisville. The multi party investigation includes testimony from UPS, Boeing, the FAA, and families of victims. Proceedings are focused on causes of the accident, safety procedures, and oversight of cargo operations. For investors following United Parcel Service (NYSE:UPS), the hearings come at a time when the stock trades around $98.87 and has declined 7.7% over the past 30 days and 31.6% over 3 years...

headline: How UPS’s Amazon Pullback And Shift Toward Higher-Margin Deliveries Has Changed Its Investment Story (UPS)
summary: In recent days, United Parcel Service (UPS) has moved ahead with its plan to sharply reduce Amazon delivery volumes while reaffirming its 2026 financial targets after reporting Q1 2026 revenue of US$21.20 billion and operating profit of US$1.27 billion. This shift away from Amazon, combined with growing small and medium-sized business and healthcare volumes, marks a meaningful pivot toward higher-margin, more specialized delivery work within UPS’s global network. We’ll now examine how UPS’s...

headline: Investors Heavily Search United Parcel Service, Inc. (UPS): Here is What You Need to Know
summary: UPS (UPS) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.

headline: What layoffs hide about the real problem with the job market
summary: Jobs can feel precarious right now as well-known companies keep slashing workers. The latest is Meta, which promised it would cut jobs this month and on Wednesday sent layoff notices to about 10 percent of its staff, nearly 8,000 people, according to news reports.Subscribe to The Post Most newsletter for the most important and interesting stories from The Washington Post.
